data: {"generalSituation":"An anticyclone aloft will bring extremely hot weather to Guangdong in the next couple of days. With a trough of low pressure edging closer to the coast of southern China, there will be showers and squally thunderstorms over the region later on Friday to Saturday. An easterly airstream will affect the coast of Guangdong over the weekend. High temperature weather will be alleviated slightly. A broad trough of low pressure is expected to bring unsettled weather to the central part of the South China Sea early to midweek next week. Besides, Tropical Cyclone Jangmi will move across the western North Pacific to the east of the Philippines in the next few days and intensify gradually. It will move in the general direction of the seas east of Taiwan to the vicinity of the Ryukyu Islands.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260528","week":"Thursday","forecastWind":"South to southwest force 3 to 4.","forecastWeather":"Mainly fine.
